items.text: Two papers accepted at ICIP 2025 — BD Open LULC Map and RGC-BENT.
Best Long Paper at BLP 2025 (EMNLP workshop) for Bangla dialect benchmarking.
FedCTTA accepted at IJCNN 2025 in Rome.
Promoted to Junior Research Scientist at CCDS.
$1,000 IEEE Signal Processing Society travel grant for ICIP 2024.
ICIP 2024 — Lightweight Recurrent Network for Image Super-Resolution.
First paper accepted at IJCNN 2023 INNS-DLIA workshop.
Joined CCDS as a Research Assistant.
Graduated from IUB with a BSc in Computer Science and Engineering.
Admitted to IUB as a CSE undergraduate.
